allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in d.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);s=[x for x in d['streams'] if x['codec_type']=='video'][0];print\(f'codec: {s[\\"codec_name\\"]}, {s[\\"width\\"]}x{s[\\"height\\"]}, duration: {s.get\(\\"duration\\",\\"N/A\\"\)}'\)")
